description: Organization profile card with logo placeholder, name, industry, tags, three stats, and bio

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Small top label, e.g. 'TARGET ORGANIZATION' or 'VICTIM PROFILE'
fields.LABEL_3: HQ location or context, e.g. 'Las Vegas, NV — Founded 1986'
fields.CONTEXT_TEXT: 2-3 sentence description of the organization and its role in the story
